com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api

Class TestCaseStatusImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.BaseExecutionJobStatus
      • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCaseStatusImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TestCaseStatus

    public class TestCaseStatusImpl
extends BaseExecutionJobStatus
implements TestCaseStatus
    Test case status implementation
    Since:
    TTworkbench 15

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      TestCaseStatusImpl(ExecuteTestCaseJobImpl job, TestCase testcase)
      Create an empty status for the given test case.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      long getEndTime()
      Returns the test case end time
      java.io.File getLogFile()
      Returns the log file where the test case was logged
      long getStartTime()
      Returns the test case start time
      TestCase getTestCase()
      Returns the test case reference

      Returns the test case verdict

      Returns the verdict reason

      • TestCaseStatusImpl

        public TestCaseStatusImpl(ExecuteTestCaseJobImpl job,
                          TestCase testcase)
        Create an empty status for the given test case. None of the fields except test case are set.
